title: French Toast with Roast Beef
description: A French-inspired breakfast dish featuring toasted bread topped with melted cheese and roast beef.
instructions: In a shallow dish, whisk together eggs, milk, salt, and pepper.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Dip each bread slice into the egg mixture, coating both sides.
Place the bread slices in the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Meanwhile, slice the roast beef into thin strips.
To assemble, place a bread slice on a plate, top with roast beef, melted cheese, and another bread slice.
Repeat the process for the remaining bread slices and filling ingredients.
